ESTEE LAUDER CO INC CL A (EL)

uncertainties.read: TRANSPOSED Schedule B grid ('Areco Schedule B', continuation of p.122): each COLUMN is one transaction (10 columns). This sheet shows only data columns; the left-hand ROW-LABEL column (Amount of Transaction A-L, Type of Transaction, Capital Gain, Transaction Date) is off-page on the preceding sheet (p.122). Header rows give EIF marker (only cols 5-6 BLACKROCK/MCSXX) + owner (SP/DC) + asset name + ticker + Transaction type (P/S(Part)); the amount matrix and Capital Gain rows are unlabeled here and degraded (X marks are dark bars), so amount=null and cap_gain_over_200=null for every tx. owner/asset/ticker/tx_type/date captured; dates are the bottom row.
uncertainties.note: downstream: the A-L bucket/Type/Capital-Gain row template is identical to p.122 ('Areco Schedule B') — use that label key to resolve amounts by row position
